summary: Solid performance highlighted by a memorable Built to Last, recording quality not discussed
review: The reviewer fondly recalls the pre‑drums Scarlet > Fire segue into Playing in the Band > Built to Last, noting that Garcia seemed to have high hopes for the latter. While they felt the tune never fully gelled live, the impression it left was strong enough to earn a positive rating despite no comments on the audio source.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a 4‑star rating; the show is praised for Built to Last but includes mild disappointment, and there is no information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The pre‑drums Scarlet > Fire transition into Playing in the Band > Built to Last was highlighted as a strong sequence, though the reviewer felt the latter never fully gelled live.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s placement of Built to Last suggested high hopes, but the performance didn’t completely gel according to the reviewer.
